spec_match.rationale: Great implementation testing exact live properties of the PWA scope: matching media display modes and using getInstalledRelatedApps() endpoints.

interactive.rationale: Dynamically reads environment variables to probe standard client capabilities, displaying context and matching link tags cleanly.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely detects if getInstalledRelatedApps exists on navigator before execution, providing standard fallback error logs if not supported.

references.rationale: Lays out the tracking ChromeStatus link correctly under see also.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful layout utilizing nice flat card tables, dashed dividers, and clear step indicators.
